channel.title: Triton on Vectors & Verbs
channel.description: Recent content in Triton on Vectors & Verbs

item.title: Speed of Thought: Optimizing Gemma with Custom Triton Kernels
item.description: A deep dive into writing custom Triton GPU kernels to accelerate Gemma’s core operations—fused RMSNorm, rotary embeddings, and fused linear layers—from first principles.
